name: Get Asset
description: Reads asset metadata from any resolvable address (hex hash, /a/<hash>, /o/<name>, /v/<path>, DID URL, or workspace path). Returns {id, exists, value} where value is the metadata map. Use asset_content for the binary payload. Mostly equivalent to covia_read with asset semantics: returns exists: false if the resolved value isn't a map.

id.description: Asset reference. Any resolvable address: hex hash, /a/<hash>, /o/<name>, /v/<path>, DID URL, or workspace path (w/, g/, j/, etc.).

exists.description: True if a metadata map was found at the address

value.description: The resolved metadata object (present when exists is true)
